title: I would like to share some stock selection methods and strategies that I have gradually refined through my trading experience.
author: Ok-Basil2753
selftext:
To be honest, although I have gazed at this curve for a long time, I still have not fully fathomed the full depth of meaning it encapsulates.

This is by no means a "rags to riches" fairy tale, nor is it a smooth, effortless journey. I have endured countless trials: the various pitfalls encountered when first entering the market, the visceral pain of capital drawdowns, and those low points that once led me to question whether I was truly cut out to survive in this market. Often, the days when my account equity was merely consolidating or even trending downward were far more agonizing and difficult to endure than the days when I was actually making a profit.

In the vast majority of cases, I focus on unearthing undervalued stocks particularly those with small float sizes or those overlooked by the broader market and patiently wait for the emergence of confirmation signals, rather than blindly chasing market fads. One of my core strategies involves seeking stability across different trend phases for instance, observing how a stock's price behaves around the 5-day, 13-day, 34-day, and 55-day moving averages, while simultaneously closely monitoring changes in trading volume and liquidity.

It took me some time to gradually discover my own rhythm: I stopped attempting to dabble in every sector and instead began channeling my entire energy into those specific areas that I could truly comprehend and consistently validate. I reduced the frequency of my trading decisions, waited patiently for optimal opportunities, strictly managed my position sizing, and learned to calmly accept the reality of "missed opportunities." Today, all of this has become a perfectly ordinary part of my daily professional life.

In essence, these two charts serve as a microcosm of my investment journey over the past few years:It is not a trajectory of linear ascent; rather, it was forged through countless arduous moments honed step by step, little by little.

If you are interested in the mindset I have cultivated over the past few years, or in the investment methodologies I employ, you are welcome to reach out and connect with me at any time. I am not looking to sell any products; I simply hope to engage in an enlightening exchange of ideas with like minded enthusiasts.
